productName: Stingers - 2pk .5g Liquid Diamonds Pre-Rolls - White Widow - 1g
description: A hybrid blunt of White Widow taken up a level with concentrate — flower plus potent extract rolled together for a bold, slow-burning, full-flavored smoke. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of woody, earthy, and flowery, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. A little goes a long way.
